## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally (or `npm run lint:fix` was run)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes locally
- [ ] SonarCloud shows no new open issues — check at:
      `https://sonarcloud.io/project/issues?id=SimonAdrell_Dicy&pullRequest=<this PR number>&issueStatuses=OPEN`
- [ ] For Android-affecting changes: apply the **`smoke-test`** label to trigger the APK build + emulator run
